title: Partial update support in PUT /books/{id}
evidence: src/app.ts:119 — validateBook called with partial=true; merges only supplied fields with existing record
suggestion: Not required by spec but good UX; no action needed

title: Comprehensive input type validation beyond spec
evidence: src/app.ts:40-56 — validates year is integer, isbn is string, id is positive integer at lines 100,112,138

title: Global error-handling middleware
evidence: src/app.ts:148-150 — catches unhandled errors and returns 500 JSON
suggestion: Good practice not required by spec
